title: Christine Lagarde: The courage to build a Europe that endures
body:
Speech by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the dinner preceding the Charlemagne Prize ceremony, Aachen, 13 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260518f.htm

title: Burkhard Balz: Central bank policy in an evolving cash landscape
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Burkhard Balz, Member of the Executive Board of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the Banknote Conference, Washinton DC, 13 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260513d.htm

title: Joachim Nagel: Stable and strong in turbulent times – Europe's responses to global challenges
body:
Speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, to the Lions Club Frankfurt-Am Leonhardsbrunn, Frankfurt am Main, 4 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260513a.htm
